Text.text: 16 categories · 857 interactive scenarios · Controls from sap.m, sap.f, sap.ui.layout, sap.uxap

TextArea.value: This content is read-only and cannot be modified.

Label.text: All buttons — resize window to see overflow

MessageStrip.text: sap.ui.table.Table is used for large datasets with virtual scrolling. See the dedicated Table Controls demo.
sap.m.Tree is bound to a hierarchical JSON/OData model. Hierarchy is defined in the data, not in the XML view.
sap.m.UploadCollection is deprecated. Use sap.m.upload.UploadSet for new implementations.

Text.text: Orders tab content — list of sales orders would appear here.

Label.text: Click to show a toast notification

MessageStrip.text: MessageToast appears at the bottom of the screen for ~3 seconds.
Information: Your changes have been saved successfully.
Success: Order 4500012345 has been submitted.
Warning: This item is below minimum stock level.
Error: Connection to the server failed. Please try again.
Without icon, without close button.
With a custom link action.

Label.text: Opens a loading overlay for 3 seconds

MessageStrip.text: BusyDialog blocks the UI and shows a spinner with a message. Auto-closes after 3 seconds in this demo.

Text.text: This panel is expanded by default. Click the header to collapse it.
This panel starts collapsed. Expand it to see this content.
This panel cannot be collapsed — the toggle button is hidden.
Panel with a custom toolbar instead of a plain header text.

MessageStrip.text: sap.m.SplitApp requires a dedicated route and wraps the entire page. On tablet/desktop it shows master + detail side by side. On phone it stacks them.
sap.f.DynamicPage wraps the entire page and provides a collapsible header that snaps on scroll. Used for object detail pages.
sap.m.Dialog: modal, blocks interaction with the rest of the page. Has header, scrollable content, and action buttons.
sap.m.Popover: non-modal, anchored to a control, closes on outside click. Used for quick edits and contextual actions.
sap.m.ActionSheet: appears at the bottom on mobile, as a popover on desktop. Used for contextual action lists.
sap.m.ResponsivePopover: Popover on desktop, Dialog on mobile. Automatically adapts to screen size.
sap.m.BadgeCustomData attaches a count badge to controls that implement IBadge (Button, Avatar, etc.).
sap.m.upload.UploadSet: drag-and-drop upload zone with file type restriction, preview, and delete. Requires server-side upload URL configuration.
sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: requires a dedicated route and view. It wraps the entire page — cannot be embedded inline.
sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection is used inside sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout to group content into anchor-navigated sections.
sap.m.Wizard requires a full-page layout (DynamicPage). This preview shows the step structure only.
sap.viz.ui5.controls.VizFrame charts require the sap.viz library. Add it to ui5.yaml and use a dedicated chart view.
sap.viz.ui5.controls.VizFrame charts require the sap.viz library. Add it to ui5.yaml and use a dedicated chart view.
sap.viz.ui5.controls.VizFrame charts require the sap.viz library. Add it to ui5.yaml and use a dedicated chart view.
sap.viz.ui5.controls.VizFrame charts require the sap.viz library. Add it to ui5.yaml and use a dedicated chart view.

List.noDataText: No favorites yet — add components from the category pages.
